name: @speed-highlight/core
when_to_use: 需要在体积敏感载体里快速高亮常见语言时用它,而非手写 token span——原生手写在长代码、多语言边界和一致主题上会失败。非做 TextMate 级精度、可编辑代码编辑器或代码执行器。
why_valuable: AI 默认无法以约 2KB 核心体积稳定完成多语言 token 分类;手工着色会漏转义、错注释边界,本库以原生 ESM 和按语言加载给出确定性 HTML。

carriers.widget: conditional:需 fetch 小型主题 CSS 并注入 shadow;无 wasm/worker/字体 CDN

isolation.evidence: highlightElement only sets elm.innerHTML (index.d.ts) — library injects no style itself. Theme CSS is a boot responsibility: widget boot does fetch(default.css)→<style>→shadowRoot (in-shadow, no head pollution); artifact boot uses document.head by convention. Library runtime-imports per-language modules from the CDN (loadLanguage) → needs CSP script/import allowance. Conditional only because theme CSS must be delivered into the shadow (widget boot does this).
